items.title: Salesforce Is Ready to Emerge an AI Winner. Buy the Stock.
items.description: The stock can rally as artificial-intelligence fears fade and management demonstrates commitment to improving profitability.  The software sector, once a stalwart on Wall Street, has been whipsawed over the past few years.  Then, ChatGPT entered investors’ consciousness.

items.title: Oakmark’s Bill Nygren on Salesforce: It has lagged enough for value investors like us to take a look
items.description: Bill Nygren, portfolio manager at Oakmark Funds, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss how he would grade 2025, his take on Salesforce, and more.

items.title: Why Truist Sees Salesforce (CRM) Positioned for AI-Driven Growth
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the AI Stocks Making Waves on Wall Street. On December 15, Truist Securities reiterated its Buy rating on the stock with a price target of $380.00. The rating affirmation follows Salesforce’s Agentforce customer event. According to the research firm, 3QFY26 represented “a solid progress report” on Agentforce and the […]

items.title: Amazon, Meta, SpaceX, OpenAI And Trillion-Dollar IPOs Lead Futurum CEO Daniel Newman's Top 2026 Tech Predictions
items.description: Daniel Newman, CEO at Futurum Research, and strategist Shay Boloor shared their top seven stock market predictions for 2026 on Tuesday.

items.title: How Investors May Respond To Salesforce (CRM) Q3 Beat And Surging Enterprise AI Adoption
items.description: In recent weeks, Salesforce reported record third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, raised its full-year guidance, and highlighted rapid adoption of its AI products Agentforce and Data 360, underpinned by new deployments at organizations such as Novartis, the U.S. Department of Transportation, and DeVry University. These developments point to Salesforce’s AI platform becoming more deeply embedded in critical workflows across healthcare, government, and education, potentially reinforcing customer...
